title: Xtra Spicy Vietnamese Beef Shin Pho
description: A spicy and light Vietnamese dish featuring beef shin, this recipe is perfect for those who like a little heat in their meal, it is also vegetarian friendly as the beef can be substituted with portobello mushrooms

ingredients.name: beef shin
ingredients.notes: or portobello mushrooms for vegetarian option

instructions: Heat a large terracotta dish over medium high heat
Add the beef shin and sear until browned on all sides
Remove the beef from the dish and set aside
Add the fish sauce, soy sauce, rice vinegar, sugar, cumin, coriander, cayenne pepper, and black pepper to the dish and stir to combine
Add the star anise to the dish and stir to combine
Add the beef broth to the dish and bring to a boil
Return the beef to the dish and reduce heat to low
Simmer the pho for 1 1/2 hours or until the beef is tender
Serve the pho hot in bowls and garnish with your choice of toppings
